items.title: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication Across Millions of Domains
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication Across Millions of Domains. Pinterest introduced MIQPS, a URL normalization system that identifies which query parameters affect page identity using rendered content fingerprints.

items.title: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ
items.summaryShort: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ. InfoQ celebrates its 20th anniversary.

items.title: Article: Artificial Intelligence-Driven Phishing: How Phishing Technique Is Evolving and Implemented
items.summaryShort: Article: Artificial Intelligence-Driven Phishing: How Phishing Technique Is Evolving and Implemented. In this article, the author examines how AI is transforming phishing from a manual, targeted activity into an automated and scalable attac

items.title: NotebookLM's new update will help you build source repository from chat
items.summaryShort: NotebookLM's new update will help you build source repository from chat. Google is making Gemini 3.5 the default model in NotebookLM

items.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
items.summaryShort: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI. A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

items.title: WhatsApp says it caught new spyware attacks linked to NSO Group in violation of court order
items.summaryShort: WhatsApp says it caught new spyware attacks linked to NSO Group in violation of court order. The messaging giant announced that it disrupted a phishing campaign targeting its users with NSO’s spyware.
